samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Implement a module for edge detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="ZERO" description="State ZERO">0</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="ONE" description="State ONE">1</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <reg-value id="state">State.</reg-value>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <equal>
                        <variable id="clk"/>
                        <constant value="1"/>
                    </equal>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <equal>
                                <variable id="rst_n"/>
                                <constant value="0"/>
                            </equal>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg-ref id="state"/> 
                                <enum-const id="ZERO"/>
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <if>
                                <condition>
                                    <equal>
                                        <variable id="state"/>
                                        <enum-const id="ZERO"/>
                                    </equal>
                                </condition>
                                <then>
                                    <assign>
                                        <output-ref id="rise"/>
                                        <constant value="1"/>
                                    </assign>
                                    <assign>
                                        <reg-ref id="state"/> 
                                        <enum-const id="ONE"/>
                                    </assign>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <assign>
                                        <output-ref id="down"/>
                                        <constant value="1"/>
                                    </assign>
                                    <assign>
                                        <reg-ref id="state"/> 
                                        <enum-const id="ZERO"/>
                                    </assign>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </then>
            </if>
        </sequential>
        <combinational>
            <assign>
                <output-ref id="rise"/>
                <constant value="0"/>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <output-ref id="down"/>
                <constant value="0"/>
            </assign>
        </combinational>
    </implementation>
</module>
